items.how_used: 论文使用基于事件存储和匹配的预测方法，将出行记录分类为常规事件（至少3次）和非常规事件，通过比较新离开时间与已有事件的均值及标准差来预测返回时间。
items.source_excerpt: When a new leave time is recorded, it is compared to leave times of existing events in an increasingly broad search; first it is compared with events containing at least one occurence on the same day of the week as the leave time; then those containing at least one occurrence on a day of the same type, either weekends or weekdays as is appropriate, and finally with all recorded events, irrespective of day. In each case, for each event meeting the criteria, it is determined whether the new leave time falls within two standard deviations of the average of the leave times of the occurences mak

items.how_used: 论文使用历史温度变化率与室外温度的关系，通过线性回归预测系统达到舒适温度所需的时间。
items.source_excerpt: We created an algorithm that calculates the amount of time necessary based on historical rates of change with the same outside temperature.

items.how_used: 论文使用平均绝对误差（0.7小时）和提前/准时预测百分比（65%）来评估返回时间预测的准确性。
items.source_excerpt: For our 10-week data sample, we were highly successful in predicting return times, obtaining an average error of 0.7 hours with over 65% of our predicted return times either early or on time.

items.how_used: 论文考虑相对湿度对体感温度的影响，通过调整设定温度来补偿湿度，使实际温度达到期望的体感温度。
items.source_excerpt: The system also takes humidity into account, using the relative humidity to determine the actual temperature needed to make the home feel like the desired temperature.

items.how_used: 论文使用GPS地理围栏技术追踪用户离开和返回，作为预测模型的数据来源。
items.source_excerpt: Using GPS technology on residents’ phones to track their leave and return as well as built-in features of the smart home system to detect when residents sleep and awaken

items.how_used: 论文以公司新闻稿形式呈现，模拟了CEO发言和产品发布，体现了团队分工和写作创意。
items.source_excerpt: John Doe, co-founder and CEO of ComfortLabs Inc., stated, “Our Enthalpy™ climate control system is designed with the busy homeowner in mind.”

items.how_used: 论文明确列出5条假设，每条都附有合理性论证，例如假设居民携带智能手机、通过灯光和运动传感器判断睡眠等。
items.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: Our smart home system has access to the lights, appliances, and measurement devices... Assumption 2: All residents of the home possess smartphones and consistently take them along when they leave the home.

items.how_used: 引言部分引用统计数据说明问题背景（90%美国人使用空调，年花费290亿美元），并明确研究目标。
items.source_excerpt: Air conditioners are used by 90% of Americans and cost homeowners $29 billion a year [1]. Even more Americans use home heating systems, which make up about 42% of the average homeowner’s utility bill [2] [3].
